name: First message gets exactly one response
responses: I'm your extra set of hands for the real world.
I can make calls for you—like booking appointments or getting info—research things, and keep your tasks sorted.
Anything on your mind that I can take off your plate?
reason: Asmi sent three separate messages in response to a single prompt instead of providing one consolidated response.
